name: REPLIGEN CORP
summary: Repligen Corporation is a global life sciences company that develops and commercializes bioprocessing technologies and systems for biological drug manufacturing. Products span four franchises: Filtration (XCell ATF, KrosFlo TFF, hollow fiber filters), Chromatography (OPUS columns, BioSMB systems), Process Analytics (FlowVPX, SciLog), and Proteins (Protein A ligands). Customers include global biopharmaceutical companies, contract development and manufacturing organizations, and life science integrators producing mAbs, RNA therapeutics, vaccines, and cell and gene therapies.

products.name: XCell ATF Cell Retention Systems
products.description: Upstream perfusion systems for seed train intensification and continuous manufacturing, available in stainless steel and single-use formats up to 5,000L bioreactors.

products.name: TangenX Flat Sheet TFF Cassettes
products.description: Tangential flow filtration cassettes for downstream ultrafiltration, concentration, buffer exchange and formulation, including single-use SIUS and reusable PRO lines.

products.name: Hollow Fiber Filters
products.description: Wide range of hollow fiber filters across sizes, surface areas, and membrane chemistries for scalable bioprocessing from development to commercial production.

products.name: KrosFlo TFF Systems
products.description: Scalable tangential flow filtration systems from lab to commercial scale (up to 5,000L), supporting HF and FS cassette formats with cGMP compliance.

products.name: KrosFlo KR2i RPM
products.description: First-to-market TFF system incorporating real-time process monitoring for in-line protein concentration management, launched in 2022.

products.name: OPUS Chromatography Columns
products.description: Pre-packed chromatography columns for bioprocessing purification applications.

products.name: BioSMB Systems
products.description: Continuous chromatography systems for downstream bioprocessing.

products.name: FlowVPX
products.description: Process analytics system for in-line concentration monitoring during TFF processes.

products.name: SciLog
products.description: Process analytics product for bioprocessing fluid management and monitoring.

products.name: Protein A Ligands
products.description: Protein A-based affinity chromatography ligands used in biologics purification, particularly for monoclonal antibodies.
